ignoreCommand: case "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" in dependabot/*) exit 0 ;; *) exit 1 ;; esac

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://vdmais-fila-inteligente-backend.onrender.com wss://vdmais-fila-inteligente-backend.onrender.com
